content.text:
Now I can clearly see atom C:20 in the molecule. Looking at the connections from atom C:20, I can identify its neighbor atoms:

1. Atom N:19 (Nitrogen) - connected to C:20
2. Atom N:21 (Nitrogen) - connected to C:20
3. Atom C:29 (Carbon) - connected to C:20

These three atoms are directly bonded to C:20, forming covalent bonds.

From the file information provided, I can see that the molecule file is named "geomconf_4577.xyz", which indicates the geomconf_index is 4577.

So the neighbor atoms of atom index 20 (C:20) are:
- Atom index 19 (N)
- Atom index 21 (N)
- Atom index 29 (C)

And the geomconf_index for this molecule is 4577.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 20, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
